link: inline-flex items-center gap-1 h-9 px-3 rounded-md text-[14px] font-medium leading-none text-[var(--konde-ink-700)] no-underline whitespace-nowrap hover:bg-[var(--konde-cream-100)] hover:text-[var(--konde-ink-900)] transition-colors
link-active: inline-flex items-center gap-1 h-9 px-3 rounded-md text-[14px] font-medium leading-none text-[var(--konde-ink-900)] no-underline whitespace-nowrap bg-[var(--konde-cream-100)]
split: h-9 inline-flex items-stretch overflow-hidden rounded-md hover:bg-[var(--konde-cream-100)]
split-label: inline-flex items-center px-3 pl-3 pr-1 text-[14px] font-medium leading-none text-[var(--konde-ink-700)] no-underline
split-chev: inline-flex items-center px-3 pr-3 pl-1.5 cursor-pointer border-none bg-transparent text-[var(--konde-ink-700)]
lang-btn: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 h-9 px-2.5 rounded-md text-[13px] font-medium leading-none text-[var(--konde-ink-700)] bg-transparent border border-transparent hover:bg-[var(--konde-cream-100)] hover:text-[var(--konde-ink-900)]
cta-pill: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 h-9 px-4 rounded-full bg-[var(--konde-green)] text-white text-[14px] font-medium leading-none no-underline whitespace-nowrap shrink-0 hover:bg-[var(--konde-green-600)] transition-colors
hamburger: lg:hidden inline-flex items-center justify-center w-9 h-9 rounded-md bg-transparent border-none cursor-pointer text-[var(--konde-ink-900)] hover:bg-[var(--konde-cream-100)]
dd-panel: absolute top-[calc(100%+6px)] left-0 min-w-[280px] bg-[var(--konde-surface)] border border-[var(--konde-border)] rounded-lg shadow-xl p-2 z-50
dd-panel-right: absolute top-[calc(100%+6px)] right-0 min-w-[110px] bg-[var(--konde-surface)] border border-[var(--konde-border)] rounded-lg shadow-xl p-1.5 z-50
dd-item: flex flex-col gap-0.5 px-3 py-2.5 rounded text-[var(--konde-ink-900)] no-underline cursor-pointer hover:bg-[var(--konde-cream-100)]
